overall.description: A cinematic static shot of a grand gothic great hall with floating candles, long dining tables occupied by students, and massive stained glass windows at the far end. The scene features detailed stone architecture and warm candlelight mixed with natural light, rendered in a high-quality game engine resembling Hogwarts Legacy.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air throughout the hall ceiling
large ornate stained glass window with colorful panes at the far end of the hall
long wooden tables arranged in rows with students seated and dining
massive stone columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling
massive stone columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand gothic great hall illuminated by floating candles and natural light from stained glass windows. Students are seated at long wooden dining tables throughout the space. At approximately 12 seconds, a student enters from the right doorway and walks toward the tables, while the camera maintains a steady wide shot of the interior architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand gothic great hall that remains poised in a state of atmospheric stillness. It begins with a wide view of the interior architecture, where floating candles and natural light from massive stained glass windows illuminate students seated at long wooden dining tables. As the camera maintains its fixed position, the static composition is subtly broken by the arrival of a student. This figure enters from a doorway on the right and walks toward the tables, adding a sense of lived-in movement to the otherwise frozen architectural grandeur.
